channel.title: Danube Regensburg on Share Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Danube Regensburg on Share Hub

item.title: Regensburg Travel Guide | UNESCO Medieval City 1.5 Hours from Munich (2025)
item.description: Regensburg is Germany’s best-preserved medieval city and a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Steinerne Brücke, a massive cathedral, Italian-style tower houses and the Danube riverbank — a world apart. 1.5 hours from Munich.
